responses.question: In a typical week, what is the total number of hours you work across all your roles combined?
How many hours per week do you spend face-to-face (or on calls) with customers — across presales and delivery?
What are the main activities that make up your customer-facing time?
responses.answer: Primarily around staffing or if the in region needs me on an escalation. Assure delivery quality and in general build confidence.

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Cloud Leader responsibilities?
In your Cloud Leader role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
1-Delivery excellence involving project reviews , accelerated delivery
2-Working with BP DP ensuring RR fulfillment 
3- Analytics / leadership reviews

responses.question: Still in your Cloud Leader role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer:
1.Getting into staffing details 
2.Regular operational activities around people management

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Delivery Partner responsibilities?
In your Delivery Partner role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer: 1. Portfolio reviews  for my region 2.Build AI awareness through demos  3.Issue based leadership 1-1 connects

responses.question: Still in your Delivery Partner role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer:
1.Being pulled into staffing situations 
2.Too DP office frequent cadences

responses.question: What is the single biggest thing that prevents you from spending time on what matters most in your role?
responses.answer: Operational activities around staffing situations . For example - I need a resource skilled on my cloud who is currently assigned on another cloud engagement . To pull him out , i need to go through a longer process.

responses.question: If you could redesign your week, what would you spend significantly more time on — and what would you hand off or stop doing?
responses.answer:
Stop Doing 
1- Managing staffing and the bureaucratic activities around it 
More time 
1-Product learning - deep dive my cloud and learn adjacent ones
2-AI enablement  to drive an AI native delivery model 
3-Business Acumen
